title: After the Mile Championship: Pop-Off Party

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Try as she might, Matikanetannhauser is unable
to beat Daitaku Helios! In her frustration, she
promises to race her again one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship comes to a close with an
unexpected invitation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios invites Matikanetannhauser to her
"pop-off party."
